emails.subject: Deal execution
emails.body: I've been working with our desk to create draft confirm which Brent received yesterday. Should I be dealing with Julian? SS Forwarded by Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT on 07/23/99 09:43 AM From: "Julian Poole/ENRON_DEVELOPMENT" AT ENRON_DEVELOPMENT@CCMAIL on 07/23/99 09:09 AM

emails.subject: Re: Deal execution
emails.body: Re: Deal execution I don't have a problem with Brent being our primary contact there. Sara Shackleton 07/23/99 09:44 AM
